testcase.name: test_campaigns_stats_endpoint_is_routed

failure.message: AssertionError: Endpoint missing/unrouted on public URL: /api/campaigns/stats assert 404 != 404 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sprint3_bi_stats_public_endpoints.py:40: in test_campaigns_stats_endpoint_is_routed assert_not_404(response, endpoint) backend/tests/test_sprint3_bi_stats_public_endpoints.py:34: in assert_not_404 assert response.status_code != 404, f"Endpoint missing/unrouted on public URL: {endpoint}" E AssertionError: Endpoint missing/unrouted on public URL: /api/campaigns/stats E assert 404 != 404 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_analytics_overview_endpoint_is_routed_for_regression

failure.message: AssertionError: Endpoint missing/unrouted on public URL: /api/analytics/overview assert 404 != 404 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sprint3_bi_stats_public_endpoints.py:52: in test_analytics_overview_endpoint_is_routed_for_regression assert_not_404(response, endpoint) backend/tests/test_sprint3_bi_stats_public_endpoints.py:34: in assert_not_404 assert response.status_code != 404, f"Endpoint missing/unrouted on public URL: {endpoint}" E AssertionError: Endpoint missing/unrouted on public URL: /api/analytics/overview E assert 404 != 404 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
